title: PHP 8.4 implicit nullable deprecation warnings
problem: PHP 8.4 throws deprecation warnings for function parameters with default null but no explicit ?Type. Affects vendor packages (laravel-money, laravel-mediable, laravel-model-caching) and app code.
solution: Suppressed via error_reporting = E_ALL & ~E_DEPRECATED in C:\php\php.ini. App-level files can be fixed directly (task_002). Vendor files should not be modified.

title: node-sass fails to build on Node 22
problem: npm install fails because node-sass@9.0.0 tries to build native bindings which are incompatible with Node 22.
solution: Run npm install --ignore-scripts, then npm uninstall node-sass && npm install sass --save-dev. The Dart-based sass package is a drop-in replacement.

title: Static assets return HTML instead of JS/CSS (Unexpected token '<')
problem: Blade templates use asset('public/vendor/...') but php artisan serve already serves from public/, causing double path public/public/... which falls through to index.php returning HTML.
solution: Workaround: symlink public/public -> public via cmd /c mklink /D. Proper fix: remove 'public/' prefix from all asset() calls in Blade templates (task_001).

title: composer install fails with ext-intl missing and PHP 8.4 platform mismatch
problem: composer install fails because ext-intl is not enabled and brianium/paratest lock file requires PHP ~8.1-8.3 but system has 8.4.
solution: Enable extension=intl in php.ini, then run composer install --ignore-platform-req=php to bypass the version lock.

title: Use PHP built-in server for local development
problem: Need a quick local dev environment without Apache/Nginx.
solution: php artisan serve runs on http://127.0.0.1:8000. Database runs in Docker: docker run --name akaunting-db -e MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD=pass -e MYSQL_DATABASE=akaunting -p 3306:3306 -d mysql:8.0
